'''ngamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khedive|khedive]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khedive|khedive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngamaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæmækæth|ngæmækæth]] || [[word:ngæmækæj|ngæmækæj]] || [[word:ngæmækæsh|ngæmækæsh]] || [[word:ngæmækæ|ngæmækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamamakath|ngamamakath]] || [[word:ngamamakaj|ngamamakaj]] || [[word:ngamamakash|ngamamakash]] || [[word:ngamamaka|ngamamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamakath|ngamakath]] || [[word:ngamakaj|ngamakaj]] || [[word:ngamakash|ngamakash]] || [[word:ngamaka|ngamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamafkath|ngamafkath]] || [[word:ngamafkaj|ngamafkaj]] || [[word:ngamafkash|ngamafkash]] || [[word:ngamafkaf|ngamafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngamakatha|ngamakatha]] || [[word:ngamakaja|ngamakaja]] || [[word:ngamakasha|ngamakasha]] || [[word:ngamakaka|ngamakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngamakath|ngamakath]] || [[word:ngamakaj|ngamakaj]] || [[word:ngamakash|ngamakash]] || [[word:ngamaka|ngamaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngamakathal|ngamakathal]] || [[word:ngamakajal|ngamakajal]] || [[word:ngamakashal|ngamakashal]] || [[word:ngamakakal|ngamakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngamakathatha|ngamakathatha]] || [[word:ngamakajaja|ngamakajaja]] || [[word:ngamakashasha|ngamakashasha]] || [[word:ngamakaka|ngamakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngamakathan|ngamakathan]] || [[word:ngamakajan|ngamakajan]] || [[word:ngamakashan|ngamakashan]] || [[word:ngamakakan|ngamakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngamakathaoro|ngamakathaoro]] || [[word:ngamakajaoro|ngamakajaoro]] || [[word:ngamakashaoro|ngamakashaoro]] || [[word:ngamakakaoro|ngamakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
